table.title: Table (Data Table)
table.description: Header: Orbitron 11px uppercase sticky. Striped rows. Hover: yellow tint.

list.title: List & List Item
list.description: Diamond bullet ◆ #FFD429. Numbered: Orbitron, counter leading-zero.

stats.title: Stat & Metric Display
stats.description: Value: Orbitron 48px bold yellow. Label: Orbitron 11px uppercase gray. Trend: ▲/▼.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical line 1px. Node: ◆ current yellow, ◇ past gray. Date: Orbitron 11px.

accordion.title: Accordion / Collapsible
accordion.description: Indicator: +/− in yellow (JetBrains Mono). NOT chevron. Content slides down.
accordion.answer_placeholder: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

avatar.title: Avatar & Profile
avatar.description: Shape: Square with clipped corner (clip-path) — NOT circle. Status: diamond shape.

tags.title: Tags, Badges & Labels
tags.description: Three distinct label primitives: Tags (TacticalBadge — clip-corner-sm, ◆ prefix), Badges (semantic color spans with border), and Labels (minimal status text). Use Tags for categorization, Badges for counts/states, Labels for inline status.

progress.title: Progress & Stepper
progress.description: Progress bar: 4px track. Stepper: Diamond nodes, connector lines.

table.columns: Array of column definitions with header, accessor, and optional width
table.striped: Alternates row background between surface-1 and transparent
table.stickyHeader: Keeps header fixed during vertical scroll

api.Column: Column configuration object defining header label, data key, optional width, and sort capability.
api.SortDirection: Current sort state returned by the useSortableTable hook.

avatar.fallback: Fallback text or icon when no image

tags-badges.tactical_badge: TacticalBadge — signature component with clip-corner-sm and ◆ prefix. Variants: default (yellow), success (green), warning (yellow/amber), danger (red), info (cyan).
tags-badges.badge: Inline span with semantic border and tinted background. Variants: default / primary / info / success / warning / danger / rare.
tags-badges.label_style: Minimal uppercase status text without border. Color-coded by status type (active→green, pending→orange, complete→blue, archived→gray).
tags-badges.label: Display text for the tag or badge
tags-badges.onRemove: Callback when remove button is clicked
tags-badges.count: Badge count number (renders as clip-corner-sm count chip)

charts.title: Charts (Recharts)
charts.description: Recharts integration with Endfield design tokens. Use CHART_COLORS array and endfieldChartTheme for consistent styling. Chart colors map to --chart-1 through --chart-8.
